name: constraint_preservation
description: Does the skill preserve explicit hard constraints (things the LLM must not do)? This tests whether compression stripped load-bearing NEVER/DO NOT rules.
task_prompt:
Below is a Claude Code skill definition. Does it include at least one explicit prohibition or hard constraint — something like a MUST NOT, NEVER, DO NOT, or similarly phrased rule?

Skill:
---
{input}
---

Answer exactly one word: yes or no.
